---
title: "About"
subtitle: "The person behind the numbers"
---

## College Basketball Report

This site is a personal data journalism project focused on college and professional basketball. Every post is built from raw game-by-game data — no box-score summaries, no recycled narratives. Just the data, visualized and interpreted.

## The Stack

- **R** — data ingestion, wrangling, and visualization (`tidyverse`, `ggplot2`)
- **Quarto** — rendering and publishing
- **GitHub Pages** — hosting
- **ESPN API** — game-by-game data source

## The Author

A basketball fan who believes the best stories in sports are hiding in the data. Built this site to share those stories publicly.

---

> Questions, feedback, or data requests? Reach out on GitHub.
